title: Issue with "Too many digits for 32 bit number" error?
body:
How may we help - what is your question?

Dear Verilator Developers!

I'm getting the following error from the tool which seems to be related to some issue dealing with constants longer than 32bits and I wonder if I'm doing something wrong or it's a known issue. 
Here are the details:

**Verilator error:**

%Error: <my-sv-source>: Too many digits for 32 bit number: 'h6D5A1BA6540E36AE7384C94779710E89BAB5778362E9B302C3A2CF202B5615A9DD5E8EF2E2EF40444F7C23BBB76A508BF48BE900D8A33DAE8829FB3C643771A6
   65 |     localparam logic [BigKeyWidth-1:0] BigKey = BigKeyWidth'h6D5A1BA6540E36AE7384C94779710E89BAB5778362E9B302C3A2CF202B5615A9DD5E8EF2E2EF40444F7C23BBB76A508BF48BE900D8A33DAE8829FB3C643771A6;
      |                                                            ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

**Relevant code snippet:** 

    localparam BigKeyWidth = 512;
    localparam logic [BigKeyWidth-1:0] BigKey = 'h6D5A1BA6540E36AE7384C94779710E89BAB5778362E9B302C3A2CF202B5615A9DD5E8EF2E2EF40444F7C23BBB76A508BF48BE900D8A33DAE8829FB3C643771A6;

**Current work around:** - adding the actual length of the number:

localparam logic [BigKeyWidth-1:0] BigKey = **512**'h6D5A1BA6540E36AE7384C94779710E89BAB5778362E9B302C3A2CF202B5615A9DD5E8EF2E2EF40444F7C23BBB76A508BF48BE900D8A33DAE8829FB3C643771A6;

Would appreciate your input on this.

Best regards,
Evgeny.
